title: Beatrix Potter Peter Christmas Dinner Set Picnic and Outdoor
features: NEW Peter Rabbit Polypropelene Christmas Dinner Set
description: From the manufacturer Beatrix Potter Gifts Peter Rabbit Christmas Dinner Set Enesco has been producing Beatrix Potter giftware since they were first granted the licence in 1987. The range has grown in size and popularity due to faithful attention to detail. Featuring many of the much-loved characters from the author’s books. A perfect gift for all occasions Over the years our artists have perfectly captured the essence of Beatrix Potter’s lovable characters by bringing to life her original drawings, to create a delightful selection of figurines and giftware, which appeal to longstanding lovers of Beatrix Potter. Featuring all your favourite characters Our Beatrix Potter collection include both the best-known characters, Peter Rabbit and Flopsy, and some characters that don’t always get the spotlight, but are loved just the same — Jemima Puddle-Duck, Squirrel Nutkin, Tom Kitten, Hunca Munca and well, the list could go on. Beatrix Potter Paw-fect Peter Rabbit baby gifts fit for your little prince or princess Whatever you choose, they’re a super thoughtful gift and a beautiful addition to any nursery or playroom. Enesco launches new collectable concept with Peter Rabbit ‘Mug of the Year’ Contemporary gift and homeware retailer, Enesco, is proud to present a new and exciting concept to its licensed Beatrix Potter collection, through its exclusive ‘ Mug of the Year’. Come Rain or Shine Enesco launches a new Peter Rabbit baby collection Enesco is proud to present its brand-new licensed P eter Rabbit Baby Collection. Having worked closely with Penguin to create the totally exclusive artwork, the new collection follows the theme ‘ Come Rain or Shine’. Beatrix Potter Gifts Peter Rabbit Tooth & Curl Box Enesco has been producing Beatrix Potter giftware since they were first granted the licence in 1987. The range has grown in size and popularity due to faithful attention to detail. Featuring many of the much-loved characters from the author’s books. A perfect gift for all occasions Over the years our artists have perfectly captured the essence of Beatrix Potter’s lovable characters by bringing to life her original drawings, to create a delightful selection of figurines and giftware, which appeal to longstanding lovers of Beatrix Potter. Featuring all your favourite characters Our Beatrix Potter collection include both the best-known characters, Peter Rabbit and Flopsy, and some characters that don’t always get the spotlight, but are loved just the same — Jemima Puddle-Duck, Squirrel Nutkin, Tom Kitten, Hunca Munca and well, the list could go on.
